title: Ubiquiti ES-12F EdgeSwitch Fiber, 12x SFP, 4x GLAN
description: Gigabit L2 switch Ubiquiti EdgeSwitch ES-12F in 19" rackmount design, L3 routing functions and s maximum 56W consumption . EdgeSwitch ES-12F je fully managable switch with 4x GLAN + 12x SFP ports and total throughput 32Gbps . From 8 of 12 SFP slots supports slower 100Mbps SFP modules The great advantages of the switch are quiet operation , since it does not include any fan and the possibility of redundant power via direct DC power connector. Switch supports power supply over 230V AC and through DC connector with variable power supply from 16 to 25V Designed for convenient management, the EdgeSwitch Configuration Interface allows administrators to configure and monitor switch features in a graphical user interface. The EdgeSwitch uses a sophisticated operating system that provides basic switching features, PoE configuration per port, and a variety of advanced features including: MSTP/RSTP/STP, VLAN, Link Aggregation, DHCP snooping, RADIUS, 802.1X and much more Device Power cord Rackmount screws
